title: Serotonin 2A Receptor Attenuates Psoriatic Inflammation by Suppressing IL-23 Secretion in Monocyte-derived Langerhans Cells
author: TAN, YEH FONG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a code for the reanalysis of publicly available single cell RNA-sequencing data. It is used in our paper to determine HTR2A, cytokines, and transcription factors expression in cells originating from psoriatic skins or healthy controls.
steps_raw: This is a code for the reanalysis of publicly available single cell RNA-sequencing data. It is used in our paper to determine HTR2A, cytokines, and transcription factors expression in cells originating from psoriatic skins or healthy controls.
